data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs navigation elements sized for ease of access and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements are optimally spaced and sized across devices.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by limiting the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: UI design follows best practices in presenting direct paths for common tasks.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Organizes information into chunks to aid memory and understanding.
data.technical_spec: Content and navigation structures make complex data easily digestible.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Familiar design patterns to align with user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistency across UI elements aligns with common web practices.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items to reduce cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping and alignment utilized throughout the site layout.
